source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Two systems \( H_1(z) \) and \( H_2(z) \) are connected in cascade as shown in the figure. The overall output \( y(n) \) is the same as the input \( x(n) \) with a one unit delay. The transfer function of the second system \( H_2(z) \) is ______.

multi_step: solving requires combining the cascade condition with the one-unit-delay constraint on overall output

multiple plausible algebraic forms are presented as 4 choices, indicating nontrivial derivation rather than direct lookup

choices are provided, so the final answer can be checked against a finite option set
